name: yun-kan-xhs-growth
description: Analyze Coupang product Excel data and create human Xiaohongshu selection notes.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze Coupang data and draft Xiaohongshu posts.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for cross-border ecommerce operators. It analyzes uploaded Coupang product Excel exports, turns the findings into a natural Xiaohongshu-style selection note, generates a cover image prompt, and can help publish through a logged-in Xiaohongshu Chrome session.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this Coupang Excel and write a Xiaohongshu note
Generate a Xiaohongshu cover for this selection analysis
Prepare this note in my logged-in Xiaohongshu account
